sections.paragraph:
m. (from the root דָּרַשׁ No. 5), a commentary, as often in the Rabbinic. 2Ch 24:27, מִדְרַשׁ סֵפֶר הַמְּלָכִים “the commentary of (or on) the book of the kings,” i.e. an historical commentary containing supplements. 2Ch 13:22. Others suppose that מִדְרָשׁ like the Arab. مِدْرَسُ means any book, but this is incorrect.

[מְדֻשָׁה (the actually occurring form), see מְדוּשָׁה .]
